I can’t fetch live schedules. Today is 17 July 2026 — there is no men's FIFA World Cup taking place in July 2026. The next Men's FIFA World Cup will be in June–July 2026 (hosted by USA/Canada/Mexico), but matches won't be played on 17 July 2026 because the tournament ends earlier in July.
